# Next Icons

Open source SVG icon library for React and Next.js.

Next Icons provides a collection of clean, consistent icons designed on a 24x24 grid.  
The library is lightweight and built for modern frontend development.

## Website

Icons Library
https://www.nexticons.com/icons

Animated Icons
https://www.nexticons.com/animated-icons

Contact  
https://www.nexticons.com/contact

Privacy Policy  
https://www.nexticons.com/legal/privacy

## Resources

GitHub Repository
https://github.com/Next-Icons/next-icons

NPM Package
https://www.npmjs.com/package/@deemlol/next-icons
